description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart persists workflow shell environment exports (and prepends the plugin scripts directory to PATH) when .workflow/config.yml exists and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions. SubagentStart records spawned Claude subagent identities in session state and injects the workflow launcher contract plus provider-specific issue-fetch usage as additionalContext for the subagent. PreToolUse protects provider cache issue body projections from unsafe frontmatter edits. PostToolUse records main-session authoring file reads in session state. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext.

hooks.description: Protect provider cache issue body projections from unsafe frontmatter edits
Record main-session workflow authoring file reads in session state
Record spawned subagent identity in workflow session state
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
